summary: Claude Code performed the first bounded implementation pass for provider-neutral Unique IA CI. Codex audited the diff, restored the security gate to both deterministic workflows, fixed the review gate to handle authorized workflow deletions, and verified 128 local tests plus all four GitHub PR checks.
validations: Claude Code bounded first pass: completed
policy_result: Passed. The high-risk CI change was explicitly authorized by the user, bounded by issue #1 and an unexpired exact-path workflow authorization. No secrets, provider action, dependency, production, deployment, billing, auth, database, force push, branch deletion, or unlisted workflow change occurred.
risk_result: High but controlled. CI and review-gate behavior changed on a public repository. Local and GitHub deterministic gates pass, and the PR remains unmerged until this audit evidence is revalidated.
unresolved_risks: The real provider apply-mode pilot exercises Claude as implementation worker but does not authorize production deployment.
The workflow authorization expires on 2026-07-27; later CI changes require renewed authority.
merge_status: PR #2 merged by squash at 2026-07-21T00:48:57Z with merge commit 0d6e47fdc35ab9f1ee57dd63f443f7112f965fcb. Issue #1 is closed. Main protection requires strict unique-ai-ci, enforces admins and conversation resolution, and blocks force pushes and deletions.
